# Tomba2Engine — the Tomba!2 PC-native game, built on the psxport framework (external/psxport submodule).
# The framework (PSX-generic static-recomp substrate + runtime + HW backends + SBS harness + VK renderer)
# is the reusable `psxport` library; this repo adds the game (game/**) + the recompiled MAIN.EXE substrate
# (generated/**, regenerated by run.sh/ensure_recomp.py) and links libpsxport.
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21)
project(tomba2engine CXX C)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS ON)

find_package(ZLIB REQUIRED)
find_package(zstd CONFIG QUIET)
if(NOT TARGET zstd::libzstd_shared)
  find_library(ZSTD_LIBRARY zstd REQUIRED)
  add_library(zstd::libzstd_shared SHARED IMPORTED)
  set_target_properties(zstd::libzstd_shared PROPERTIES IMPORTED_LOCATION "${ZSTD_LIBRARY}")
endif()
find_package(Threads REQUIRED)

# libchdr (CHD access) comes from the Beetle PSX submodule NESTED under the psxport submodule.
add_subdirectory(external/psxport/vendor/beetle-psx/deps/libchdr ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/libchdr_build EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)

# The framework static library (psxport) — builds from external/psxport via PSXPORT_ROOT (self-locating).
include(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/external/psxport/cmake/psxport.cmake)

# The game binary (tomba2_port): game/** + generated/** linking libpsxport. Output: scratch/bin/tomba2_port.
include(cmake/tomba2_port.cmake)
